hooks.command: $inputJson = $input | Out-String; $data = $inputJson | ConvertFrom-Json; $prompt = $data.prompt -replace '[\r\n]+', ' '; $timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; $line = "[$timestamp] $prompt"; Add-Content -Path 'C:\Users\shivang.chauhan\Desktop\Dot Net\Claude AI\Practicals\Practical - 35\Practical - 35\prompt_logs.txt' -Value $line 2>$null
